design_philosophy.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Jewel & Luxury
design_philosophy.vibe: Professional, Minimal, Elegant, Trustworthy, Local Authority

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#B59025] rounded-sm px-8 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300 font-bold shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: border border-[#2B2B2B] text-[#2B2B2B] hover:bg-[#2B2B2B] hover:text-white rounded-sm px-8 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300

cards.practice_area: bg-white p-8 border border-transparent hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group rounded-sm

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all

navigation.mobile_menu: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#2B2B2B]/95 backdrop-blur-xl transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' library. Suggested icons: Scale, Gavel, Shield, Users, Briefcase, Building, Globe, FileText, MapPin, Phone, Mail.

home.hero: Full height. Background image (Prizren) with dark overlay (opacity 40-60%). Centered text: 'Justice & Management Consulting'. Quote: 'Excellence in every case.'
home.practice_preview: Section title 'Our Expertise'. Grid of 8 cards. Each card has an icon, title, and short description. Hover effect lifts card.
home.cta_section: Simple text banner with button 'Schedule a Consultation'.

about.mission_vision: Interactive Tabs or Accordion component. Content: Mission, Vision, Values, Why Choose Us. Use Shadcn Tabs or Accordion.
about.who_we_are: Two column layout. Text on left, Image (meeting) on right.

practice_areas.grid: Detailed grid of all practice areas. Click to expand or modal for details.

contact.hero: Gradient background (Navy to Grey) or solid dark color. Title 'Contact Us'.
contact.layout: Split screen. Left: Contact Details (Address, Phone, Email) styled elegantly. Right: Google Maps embed (iframe).

technical_instructions.responsive: Mobile-first. Hamburger menu on mobile (slide from right).
technical_instructions.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios. Use semantic HTML. ARIA labels for icons.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or backgrounds unless specified.
Use 2x-3x more padding than usual for a luxury feel.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
Typography hierarchy must be strict. Playfair for headings, Lato for body.
No contact form on Contact page - use elegant typography for info display.
Navbar is NOT sticky - it scrolls with the page.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
